description: Configuration for date, time, timezone, and NTP settings on IBM Verify Access appliances. The date and time settings can be synchronized to a external NTP server, or set to a time-zone using canonical names.

ntp_servers.description: List of hostnames or addresses to use as NTP servers.

time_zone.description: The id of the timezone the appliance is operating in.

date_time.description: The current date and time, in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss'.
